content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll read all the PNG image files and create descriptions for each Figma design page.

⊰IUTP

Based on my analysis of the 20 Figma design page images, here is the indexed table with brief descriptions:

| --- | --- |

| figma-353 | Pular onboarding screen: automatic discount application feature |
| figma-354 | Annotation: auto-correct when points exceed maximum available |
| figma-355 | Annotation: use all button updates points and real value fields |
| figma-356 | Auto Insurance Voucher, review screen before voucher creation |
| figma-357 | Auto Insurance Voucher, success state with created date |
| figma-360 | Annotation: bidirectional sync between points and real value |
| figma-361 | Annotation: maximum discount equals user's total points |
| figma-362 | Terms and conditions screen: voucher usage rules and conditions |
| figma-369 | Terms screen: Auto Insurance voucher conditions and important details |

| figma-377 | Terms screen: reusable voucher multiple-use conditions |
